headline: Franklin Resources Crypto Push Weighs On Valuation And Recent Share Performance
summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) has agreed to acquire 250 Digital, a cryptocurrency investment management firm. The deal folds 250 Digital into a new unit called Franklin Crypto, focused on active crypto asset management. Part of the transaction will be settled using BENJI tokens, which are linked to Franklin's blockchain based mutual fund efforts. For investors watching Franklin Resources at a share price of $23.4, this move adds a dedicated crypto arm in addition to its traditional asset...

headline: Franklin's March AUM Declines 3.1% Sequentially Despite Net Inflows
summary: BEN's AUM slipped 3.1% in March to $1.68T as market weakness offset $5B inflows, with declines across most asset classes.
